bundle.shortDescription: Your local AI agent with a brain you can watch grow.
bundle.longDescription: Engram is a personal AI agent built loosely on how a brain works: it keeps what matters, forgets the rest, and gets better the more you use it. Every memory write, skill change, and autonomous action is signed, append-only, and reversible. It runs as a single small local daemon that sleeps to near-zero when idle.
